title: 'One Piece: Heroines' Unveils Cast Pair, Promo
content: The One Piece Red Stage event at AnimeJapan 2026 unveiled a cast pair and a promotional video for One Piece: Heroines anime on Saturday. The anime adapting Jun Esaka's adventure fantasy light novel will premiere at 11.15 a.m. on July 5. Voice actors Takehito Koyasu (Jujutsu Kaisen) and Maaya Sakamoto (Enen no Shouboutai) are joining the cast as Lubno and Miucca, respectively. Haruka Kamatani (Majo Minarai wo Sagashite) is helming the anime, with Momoka Toyoda (One Piece Fan Letter) writing...

title: 'Magic Knight Rayearth' Reveals Main Cast, Staff, Teaser Promo for Fall 2026
content: The Magic Knight Rayearth (Mahou Kishi Rayearth) Red Stage at AnimeJapan 2026 revealed the main cast, staff, teaser promotional video, and a key visual (pictured) on Saturday. The anime adapting CLAMP's mahou shoujo manga is scheduled to premiere on TV Asahi's "IMAnimation W" frame at 11.45 p.m. in October 2026. title: 'Uchi no Otouto-domo ga Sumimasen' Reveals Additional Cast, First Promo, 2 Consecutive Cours for Summer 2026
content: The Aniplex Booth at AnimeJapan 2026 event revealed additional cast, a key visual (pictured), and the first promotional video for Uchi no Otouto-domo ga Sumimasen (Please Excuse My Younger Brothers) television anime on Saturday. The anime adapting Akira Ozaki's comedy shoujo manga will air for two consecutive cours on Tokyo MX, followed by Gunma TV, Tochigi TV, and BS11 starting at 12.00 a.m. on July 4. title: 'Youjo Senki II' Reveals Additional Cast, Staff, First Promo for Summer 2026
content: The Kadokawa Live Station stage at AnimeJapan 2026 revealed an additional cast pair, new staff, the first key visual (pictured), and a promotional video for Youjo Senki II (Saga of Tanya the Evil II) on Saturday. The second season adapting Carlo Zen's military-themed action fantasy light novel will premiere in July 2026. title: Additional Cast for 'Kami no Shizuku' Announced
content: The Pony Canyon booth at AnimeJapan 2026 announced four additional cast members for the television anime adaptation of Tadashi Agi and Shuu Okimoto's Kami no Shizuku (The Drops of God) manga on Saturday. The anime series will air for two consecutive cours at 11:30 p.m. on Tokyo MX, followed by Kansai TV and BS NTV, starting April 10. title: Supporting Cast Pair for 'Black Torch' Announced
content: The Black Torch Special Stage at AnimeJapan's White Stage announced a supporting pair of cast on Saturday. The anime series adapting Tsuyoshi Takaki's action supernatural manga is scheduled to premiere on Tokyo MX and other channels on July 4. Voice actors Toshiyuki Morikawa (Black Clover) and Nobuhiko Okamoto (Undead Unluck) are joining the anime as Amagi and Kouga, respectively. title: 'Dandelion' Reveals Additional Cast, First Promo
content: The Netflix Special Stage at AnimeJapan's Blue Stage revealed additional cast, a key visual (pictured), and promotional video for Dandelion on Saturday. The seven-episode anime series will exclusively stream worldwide on Netflix on April 16. title: 'Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu.' Sequel Announced for July 2026
content: The Kadokawa Booth at AnimeJapan 2026 event announced a sequel for the Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu. (Shiboyugi: Playing Death Games to Put Food on the Table) television anime on Saturday, revealing cast, teaser trailer, and a game visual (pictured). title: 'Tetsuryou! Meet with Tetsudou Musume' Reveals Additional Cast Pair, First Promo, Fall 2026 Premiere
